name: XEN Mining Agent v1
description: Autonomous on-chain agent that manages XEN token mining operations across proxy wallets on PulseChain. Executes time-sensitive claim + stake + restart cycles via scoped session-key delegation (ERC-4337 + EIP-7702). The agent holds no withdrawal authority — it can only perform the narrow set of operations authorized by the owner.

permissions: Can call batchClaim() on the manager
Can call batchClaimStakeAndRestart() on the manager
restrictions: Cannot withdraw funds to arbitrary addresses
Cannot modify stake percentage or term defaults
Session key expires in 364 days, renewable by owner
